subcodes.title: Words to the Baha'is, spoken on 1912-11-02
subcodes.first_line: The first duty of the members is to effect their own unity and harmony, in order to
subcodes.first_line_orig: اول وظیفه اعضا الفت و اتحاد آنهاست که سبب حصول نتائج حسنه گردد
